page_content:
Prerequisite: HEBR313; or permission of instructor.

Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs.

Formerly: HEBR441 and HEBR442.

JWST469 Readings in Rabbinic Hebrew (3-4 Credits)

Readings in classical rabbinic texts and related corpora. Emphasis on grammar and reading skills as well as critical analysis of the material. Language of instruction: English; all texts in original language. Prerequisite: HEBR313; or permission of instructor.

Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]
